description: During a concrete pour, a technician takes test cylinders. The site manager must ensure they are correctly labeled and stored before being picked up by the lab.

nodes.task_description: Log the ID numbers of the test cylinders taken during the pour.

expected_outcome.expected: The cylinder IDs are recorded in the quality log.

nodes.task_description: Verify the cylinders are labeled with the pour date, location, and sample ID.

expected_outcome.expected: The labels are confirmed to be correct.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a pickup with the testing lab for the next day.

expected_outcome.expected: The lab confirms they will pick up the samples.
